code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut start = -1
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = false
    if i == n
      is_ws = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          print("")
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let len_nums = nums.len()
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < len_nums
    match nums.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      let slen = sorted.len()
      mut j = 0
      mut inserted = false
      mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
      while j < slen
        match sorted.get(j)
        when Some(sv)
          if not inserted and v <= sv
            new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
            inserted = true
          end
          new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, sv)
        when None
          print("")
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      if not inserted
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
      end
      sorted = new_sorted
    when None
      print("")
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut m = 0
  let slen2 = sorted.len()
  while m < slen2
    match sorted.get(m)
    when Some(v)
      if m == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      print("")
    end
    m = m + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
